chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1352 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.5705/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 10.01.2024 Mr. Imran Mobeen Khan, Assistant Prosecutor General. Mr. Ghulam Mustafa Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with ASI Allah Jiwayo Rind of Police Station Ubauro..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioner. No intimation is received. This case has been fixed today on urgent application filed by the Advocate for the petitioner, yet he has chosen to remain absent. ASI present in Court has informed that case has already been challaned, for the quashment of which this petition has been filed. In view of above, this petition is dismissed in non- prosecution along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
